# hermes-xray

Standalone browser-based observability demo for a Hermes-style tool-using agent.

Repository: https://github.com/DanDo385/hermes-xray
Inspired by, but independent from: https://github.com/DanDo385/agent-runtime

## Interactive behavior

A visitor enters a simple prompt and inspects five observable runtime stages:

1. Prompt intake
2. Context construction
3. Loop policy
4. Tool dispatch
5. Verification and persistence

The static demo displays model-visible prompt summaries, loop state, tool events, token estimates, stop reasons, and verification evidence. It does not expose hidden chain-of-thought, secrets, credentials, or private session fragments.

## Files

- `index.html`: self-contained HTML/CSS/JavaScript demo
- `hermes-xray.json`: structured project/runtime export
- `PORTFOLIO.md`: portfolio-site integration contract
